characters.name: Army Soldiers
characters.description: Army SoldiersCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanAlignmentGovernmentGroupThe ArmyTheArmy Soldiersare the main force representing the government. They fight to maintain law and order against villainy. Though most of them are very similar, there are a few differences in face and skin color and tone of voice. All of them wear a uniform of green lined with yellow. Their uniforms include an armored vest, a helmet, and a visor that covers the lower half of their face. Some of them are cowardly and bring up doubts to their superiors, but in the end they do as they are told. It is not unusual for them to focus on what is the most important objective, which is usually used for comedy.

characters.name: Bolkar
characters.description: BolkarCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesNo InformationAlignmentVillainsFriendsChaosageddon,Dr. Squid,Green MenaceEnemiesLeague of Super EvilGroupLegion of Supreme EvilSeries InformationVoiced byScott McNeilOnly AppearanceA LOSE/LOSE SituationBolkaris the commander of theLegion of Supreme Evil, and the counterpart toVoltar. Like the rest of the legion, Bolkar was defeated by the league when their house was blown away by one ofDr. Squid's inventions. He is the same height and body type to Voltar, but with quite a few differences. He looks very similar toVoltar's clonein color scheme, with dark grey and black as the main colors and a gold as accents. The mask has three lines on it rather than two. His voice is slightly deeper and slower. He is the leader and main schemer of his group, but has a more dignified and laid-back way of speaking than Voltar.

characters.name: Buddlington Von Pantaloon III
characters.description: Buddlington Von Pantaloon IIICharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlignmentVillainGroupNoneBuddlington Von Pantaloon IIIisVoltar's old rival and former friend fromSupervillain Kiddy College. He wears a grey coat with yellow buttons, long yellow gloves, and a grey helmet with white underwear stretched over the top. His heavy accent suggests that he is German.

characters.name: Chaosageddon
characters.description: ChaosageddonCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesDoomhoundAlignmentVillainsFriendsBolkar,Dr. Squid,Green MenaceEnemiesLeague of Super EvilGroupLegion of Supreme EvilSeries InformationOnly AppearanceA LOSE/LOSE SituationChaosageddonis the mascot hound of the Legion of Supreme Evil, and the counterpart toDoomageddon. Like the rest of the legion, Chaosageddon was defeated by the league when their house was blown away by one ofDr. Squid's inventions. He is the same height and body type toDoomageddon, but with a number of differences. He is bright red, and wears a black hood and studded collar. Chaosageddon is just as vicious and violent as Doomageddon, though better tamed byBolkar.

characters.name: Chaosageddon
characters.description: ChaosageddonCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesDoomhoundAlignmentVillainsFriendsBolkar,Dr. Squid,Green MenaceEnemiesLeague of Super EvilGroupLegion of Supreme EvilSeries InformationOnly AppearanceA LOSE/LOSE SituationChaosageddonis the mascot hound of the Legion of Supreme Evil, and the counterpart toDoomageddon. characters.name: Commander Chaos
characters.description: Commander ChaosCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlignmentVillainAmbitionRampage to his heart's contentCommander Chaosis one of the top villains inMetrotownand he is the arch-nemesis of theForce Fighters V. He is the owner of theSuper S Atomic Shuriken Typhoon Robot. An ideal day for Commander Chaos involves waking up for some early morning rampage (accompanied by a non-fat latte and some disco), followed by a light lunch with some afternoon rampaging. After a hard day's rampage, Commander Chaos likes to curl up on the couch and read a good book on... you guessed it... famous disco rampages. He is a thin man who wears a tight body suit that covers his whole body except for the lower half of his face. His color scheme is green and orange, with the most distinctive part of his costume being the orange fin on his head. The logo on his chest is a grey circle with two segments missing from the top and bottom (similar to a power button or buffering symbol).

characters.name: Cookie Commandos
characters.description: Cookie CommandosCharacter InformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanAlignmentCivilianGroupSuzie ScoutsTheCookie Commandosare an elite group of little girls part of theSuzie Scouts. According toDoktor Frogg, they are the "toughest cookies.". Each girl is wearing a purple ninja-like body suit that covers their whole body except for their eyes, and allows their ponytails to poke out. They also wear the purple berets that all Suzie Scouts. They are probably less than 14 years old each. Each is silent and persistent. Once they start hunting someone down they will never stop.

characters.name: Dipper
characters.description: DipperCharacter InformationSpeciesDolphinAlignmentMilitaryGroupThe ArmyOriginArmyBase 55Dipperis a mechanically, and electrically modified dolphin known as  trained by the army to fight for good. It is a "highly trained aquatic soldier" with the code of 404-A according toThe Army. TheLeague of Super Evilmistook it for a ferocious shark and stole it to protect their inflatable pool. Dipper appears to be a normal, friendly dolphin, with a light blue color scheme and black beady eyes. It can only speak through the chirping noises a dolphin makes, and in general acts like a dolphin, albeit a hyper-intelligent one. It is also able to stand on its flipper and walk around outside of water, similar to a human.

characters.name: Doktor Frogg
characters.description: Doktor FroggCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesNo InformationAlignmentVillainGroupLeague of Super EvilDoktor Froggis the inventor and brains of theLeague of Super Evil. While a mad scientist to the core, Frogg is the unluckiest man alive as he is always severely injured in some way or form, at least once per episode but often multiple times. The fact that he is always getting into accidents and/or being targeted byDoomageddonas prey, could be considered as a running gag. Since there is a "K" instead of a "C" in his name "Doktor" it is possible that he may be at least part German, but it may also be simply a play on the stereotype of an evil mad scientist being German.

characters.name: Doktor Frogg clone
characters.description: Doktor Frogg cloneCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlignmentEvilEnemiesLeague of Super EvilGroupLeague of Super Evil ClonesSeries InformationOnly AppearanceSend in the Clones Doktor Frogg's cloneis a much more evil version ofDoktor Froggwho he was created by in an attempt to create clones to do their dirty work. He Looks identacle to the realDoktor Frogg, only with red-pants and a white-labcoat instead of a jumpsuit, manic-eyes, greyer-toned claws and chin, and a huge, pulsating head.

characters.name: Doomageddon
characters.description: DoomageddonCharacter InformationSpeciesPan-Dimensional DoomhoundAlignmentVillainGroupLeague of Super EvilOriginDoomworldDoomageddonis one of the four members of theLeague of Super Evil. It is an inter-dimensional creature similar to a dog, said to be called a Doomhound, andVoltarconsiders it his pet. While he is capable of driving the V-Mobile on occasion, he can usually be seen riding in the small trailer hitched to the back. It is a yellow creature with brown stripes that mainly walks on all fours, and has sharp teeth and horns. It wears a brown hooded jumpsuit without any sleeves or legs, and a studded leather collar. Doomageddon is a mischievous, bestial character that spends most of its time sleeping, eating, or breaking things. It will gladly eat any random object or person it comes across, including the other members of L.O.S.E..

characters.name: Doomageddon clone
characters.description: Doomageddon cloneCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesPan-Dimensional DoomhoundAlignmentEvilEnemiesLeague of Super EvilGroupLeague of Super Evil ClonesSeries InformationOnly AppearanceSend in the Clones Doomageddon's cloneis a much more evil version of the originalDoomageddoncreated byDoktor Froggin an attempt to create clones to do their dirty work. Looks identacle to the real Doomageddon, but his color is sickly green, has red-eyes, long horns from his head, a spiked collar, has a longer tail with larger spikes and always shows an angry face. He is believe to have the same powers as the real Doomaggedon, but much more powerful, since didn't disappear in a blue-flame, but rather a small green nuclear explosion.

characters.name: Dr. Squid
characters.description: Doktor SquiddCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlignmentVillainsFriendsBolkar,Chaosageddon,Green MenaceEnemiesLeague of Super EvilGroupLegion of Supreme EvilSeries InformationVoiced byLee TockarOnly AppearanceA LOSE/LOSE SituationDoktor Squiddis the inventor for the Legion of Supreme Evil, and the counterpart toDoktor Frogg. He blew away his team's house with them inside with one of his inventions. He is the same height and body type toDoktor Frogg, but with quite a few differences. He is blonde, with his short hair slicked down, and wears a white doctor's coat. He is the inventor and enabler of the group, but is rather quiet and only does what is told to him.

characters.name: Elizabeth Sergeant
characters.description: Elizabeth SergeantCharacter InformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanAlignmentCivilianGroupThe ArmyElizabeth "Liz" Sergeant, A.K.A. Lightning Liz, is the daughter ofGeneral Sergeant. When she took her father's prototype battle armor, she dubbed herself "Lightning Liz" and chased the League through her debut episode, named after her super hero name. She is a thin teenage girl who wears gold jewelry, tight jeans, and a grey and orange blouse. She ties her dark brown hair up in a ponytail, and wears makeup. Elizabeth is short tempered and gets jealous of and enamored with things easily. She is a stuck-up and spoiled teenager who is always seeking the newest and most stylish things. She loves shopping the mall, and finding fashionable goods. She hates being looked down on, someone being more fashionable than her, and those who waste her time or get in her way.

characters.name: Evil Stevens
characters.description: Evil StevensCharacter InformationSpecieshumanAlignmentVillainEvil Stevensis the president ofRotten Core, a company that sells  gadgets for villains. Evil Stevens is blonde with a pencil thin mustache and a soul patch. He has long hair that he wears back in a ponytail and fair skin. He often wears a dark grey turtleneck, blue jeans, and a black belt with a silver buckle. Smooth talking and seductive, his greatest strength is his charisma and confidence and his greatest weakness is when that confidence gets the better of him (kinda like Regina George).

characters.name: Evil Stevens

characters.name: General Sergeant
characters.description: General SergeantCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlignmentGovernment (Lawful Neutral)GroupThe ArmyGeneral Sergeantis General ofThe Armyand in charge of weapon development and countering the forces of Evil. such counter measures are usually attempted by obtaining powerful items first to "keep them out of the hands of evil," as well as using their human forces and weapons to stop destructive rampages. He is a big guy with broad shoulders and a small black mustache. He wears a green military uniform and military boots, with a green beret. His chest is highly decorated. He has a loud voice and is often shouting orders or one-liners, and will often go out the front lines himself against villainy, especially against Skullosus. Though strict and commanding to almost everyone, he is meek and subservient to his spoiled daughter.

characters.name: General Sergeant
characters.description: General SergeantCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlignmentGovernment (Lawful Neutral)GroupThe ArmyGeneral Sergeantis General ofThe Armyand in charge of weapon development and countering the forces of Evil. such counter measures are usually attempted by obtaining powerful items first to "keep them out of the hands of evil," as well as using their human forces and weapons to stop destructive rampages. He is a big guy with broad shoulders and a small black mustache. He wears a green military uniform and military boots, with a green beret. His chest is highly decorated. He has a loud voice and is often shouting orders or one-liners, and will often go out the front lines himself against villainy, especially against Skullosus. Though strict and commanding to almost everyone, he is meek and subservient to his spoiled daughter.

characters.name: Glory Guy
characters.description: Glory GuyCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesNo InformationAlignmentHeroGlory Guyor Captain Glory Guy is one ofMetrotown's most distinctive and renowned superheroes, and lives in the grandHalls of Glory. Formerly known as Glory Kid in superhero kiddie college, Captain Glory Guy is leader of a superhero group known as "Legion of Glory." Glory Guy is a tall, angular man with muscles. His costume is a white jumpsuit lined in bright red stripes and with red boots and wing-like attachments on his head. He has a golden star on his chest, along with some other golden accents. He is a rather standard type of "heroic" personality, and can come across as showy and even arrogant. He is amiable and friendly towards non-evil characters, and theLeague of Super Evilis included in this as he seems to consider them a low priority and not truly Evil. For example, when their Uncatchable Evil Flying Disk of Doom lands in his front yard, he is more than willing to give it back untilDoktor Froggtalks about how he will enhance it to be actually evil. On the other hand, he is determined to punish all true evildoers and protect the innocent citizens.

characters.name: Goldenrod
characters.description: GoldenrodCharacter InformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanAlignmentHeroesGroupForce Fighters VSeries InformationVoiced byTabitha St. GermainGoldenrodis one of the members of theForce Fighters V, and pilots the "Slick Hovercraft" which becomes the left foot of a giant robot. Her costume is a matching pair to the rest of the team in a different shade. The suit and helmet is a calm yellow, accented by the white gloves and boots. The mouth piece on the mask does not move, even when speaking. She also has a white skirt attached to her costume, and is one of the taller members of the team. As the only female of the group, the poses and gestures are slightly more feminine. She is as motivated and energetic in her line delivery as Rosé. Her voice is light and enthusiastic, with a playful tone.

characters.name: Henchbots 017 and 032
characters.description: Henchbots 017 and 032Character InformationSpeciesRobotAlignmentVillainsGroupLeague of Super EvilHenchbots 017 and 032are the personal robots belonging to theLeague of Super Evil. They fall apart easily, even when performing simple tasks. Their duties include cleaning up afterDoomageddon, household chores, and playingVoltar's dramatic background music (but they usually play polka music instead). They are also occasionally sent out to battle, which will always result in their destruction, as they don't seem to have any sort of gear or abilities. The henchbots are a matching pair of humanoid robots made of grey metal parts held together by black plastic joints. There are a few slight differences, as 017 is lined with a shade of pale green and is taller, while 032 is lined with a shade of yellow and is shorter. They are obedient, but incompetent robots who don't seem to be very bright, yet have some indicators or personality. They are often smiling, even when they get broken apart.

characters.name: Henchbots 017 and 032

characters.name: Humongo
characters.description: HumongoCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesNo InformationAlignmentEvilFriendsVoltina (Wife)EnemiesVoltarLeague of Super EvilSeries InformationVoiced byColin MurdockFirst AppearanceDial 'E' for EvilLatest AppearanceVoltina Humungois an evil alien who has destroyed and conquered many planets across the galaxy. He came to earth disguised asVoltarto steal all the black liquorice twisty blobs in order to take over the universe.

characters.name: Justice Gene
characters.description: Justice GeneCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlignmentHeroesAmbitionTo become a great HeroGroupUniform Neighborhood Code of Orderly LivingJustice Geneis a character who is convinced that every path he takes in life will lead him to become a super hero. He lives inMetrotown, and is often seen working odds and ends of jobs. Gene has dark brown hair, a uni-brow, and a long chin. He is always seen wearing the current uniform of his workplace, but is commonly in khaki shorts and a blue collared shirt with short sleeves and a black tie. He is hardworking and earnest, with a never-ending determination, but he is not terribly competent or intelligent. He seems to have a similar education asVoltar, as their history knowledge matches.

characters.name: League of Super Evil
characters.description: League of Super EvilGroup InformationAffilliationVillainsGoalTrue EVILHQThe LOSE LairEpisode IntroducedJustice Gene/Table for 4The League of Super Evil or L.O.S.E.is a team of villains, and the main focus of the TV show of the same name. The group is fairly unknown in the supervillain circles ofMetrotown, but it's leader has big plans for infamy. They live in a suburban neighborhood in theirLair.

characters.name: League of Super Evil
characters.description: League of Super EvilGroup InformationAffilliationVillainsGoalTrue EVILHQThe LOSE LairEpisode IntroducedJustice Gene/Table for 4The League of Super Evil or L.O.S.E.is a team of villains, and the main focus of the TV show of the same name. The group is fairly unknown in the supervillain circles ofMetrotown, but it's leader has big plans for infamy. They live in a suburban neighborhood in theirLair.

characters.name: League of Super Evil Clones
characters.description: League of Super Evil ClonesGroup InformationAffilliationVillainsGoalDominate the worldEpisode IntroducedSend in the Clones TheClonesof the League of Super Evil members were created byDoktor Froggin an attempt to create minions who would do the dirty work (mainly cleaningDoomageddon's radioactive droppings) for the original League members. However, they turned out to be even better at evil schemes than the original league, and almost took over the world. Due to Doktor Frogg's adjustments, the clones show exaggerated improved qualities based off of each member. Doktor Frogg's clone becomes more cunning and able to build inventions at a moments notice, Red Menace's clone becomes stronger and sturdier, Doomageddon's clone becomes more demonic, and Voltar's clone becomes more ambitious and villainous in general. Due to Doktor Frogg's adjustments, the clones show exaggerated improved qualities based off of each member. Doktor Frogg's clone becomes more cunning and able to build inventions at a moments notice, Red Menace's clone becomes stronger and sturdier, Doomageddon's clone becomes more demonic, and Voltar's clone becomes more ambitious and villainous in general. However, as clones they have a short lifespan, and quickly turn into puddles of golden goo after a few hours.

characters.name: Linemaster
characters.description: LinemasterCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesNo InformationAlignmentVillainTheLinemasteris a young villain with an army of Linebots to do his bidding! Doktor Frogg discovering Linemaster in Hall of Confiscated Villain Loot He is a short, blond kid with a yellow and red color scheme. He wears goggles held together with tape, a yellow tunic with an emblem representing a velvet line divider, and a red belt, shoes, and hood. He also has fancy red and gold pauldrons on his shoulders.

characters.name: Linemaster
characters.description: LinemasterCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesNo InformationAlignmentVillainTheLinemasteris a young villain with an army of Linebots to do his bidding! characters.name: Magenta
characters.description: MagentaCharacter InformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlignmentHeroesGroupForce Fighters VMagentais one of the members of theForce Fighters V, and pilots the "Sweet Attack Helicopter." His costume is a matching pair to the rest of the team in a different shade. The suit and helmet is a dark reddish-purple, accented by the white gloves and boots. The mouth piece on the mask does not move, even when speaking. He is of an average height and with a thinner figure. Quieter than the rest of the team, he nevertheless contributes to the clique phrases the rest of them say, albeit less frequently. He seems more serious than his counterparts, and his voice is deeper than the rest.
